displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Filtre de protection contre la numérisation des ports
displayData.description: Ce filtre empêche l'analyse des ports. Cela signifie généralement qu'il n'existe aucun écouteur. Si vous procédez au débogage, vérifiez que votre scénario comporte un écouteur.

displayData.name: Filtre de protection contre la numérisation des ports
displayData.description: Ce filtre empêche l'analyse des ports. Cela signifie généralement qu'il n'existe aucun écouteur. Si vous procédez au débogage, vérifiez que votre scénario comporte un écouteur.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.description: This is the default outbound filter which blocks or permits traffic based on user configured default settings

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6(DHCPV6-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCPV6 (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6) messages for stateful and stateless configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) messages for stateful auto-configuration.

displayData.description: Inbound rule to allow Delivery Optimization to connect to remote endpoints

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows an AppContainer to receive loopback traffic from itself

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from by policy allowed AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from other non-AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: InternetClientServer Inbound Default Rule
displayData.description: InternetClientServer Inbound Default Rule

displayData.name: UWP Default Inbound Block Rule
displayData.description: This is the UWP Default Inbound Block filter. This filter blocks any inbound packets to UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for listening to a resource.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Loopback Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound DHCP Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for DHCP connections when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Next Hop Tunnel Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for tunneling when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Tunnel Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for tunneling when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: This filter blocks any inbound non-loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: DhcpFirewallPolicy
displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.name: DhcpFirewallPolicy
displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.name: Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service service hardening - RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service

displayData.name: Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service service hardening - RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service

displayData.name: Allow WebThreatDefSvc to receive from port 443
Allow inbound UDP traffic to NTP port 123
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow PNRP to send to port 3540
Allow Grouping to receive from port 3587
Allow inbound TCP traffic to AJRouter
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 1900
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 3702
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5040
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5160 (Wi-Fi Direct Transport)
Allow inbound UDP traffic to CDPSvc port 5050
Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Allow inbound RPC traffic to the Block Level Backup service (wbengine) over TCP
Allow incoming RPC traffic to VDS
IPsec Policy Agent service hardening - Remote Management
displayData.description: Allow IPsec Policy Agent inbound RPC/TCP traffic for Remote Management

displayData.name: Allow all inbound TCP and RPC to SPPEXTCOMOBJ
Allow inbound UDP traffic to SNMPTRAP service
Allow inbound UDP traffic to AJRouter
Block all inbound traffic to SearchProtocolHost
Block all inbound traffic to SearchFilterHost
WSH Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: Blocks all inbound traffic for services who have been network hardened

displayData.name: Filtre d’inspection FTP
displayData.description: Ce filtre permet l’inspection du protocole FTP.

displayData.name: AppContainerBoottimeFilter
displayData.description: Boottime filter for App Containers

displayData.name: AppContainerBoottimeFilter
displayData.description: Boottime filter for App Containers

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: WFD ASP Coordination Protocol (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for WLAN Service to allow coordination protocol for WFD Service sessions [UDP 7235]

displayData.name: WFD ASP Coordination Protocol (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for WLAN Service to allow coordination protocol for WFD Service sessions [UDP 7235]

displayData.description: Inbound rule for mDNS traffic [UDP]

displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open TCP port to enable RTSP

displayData.description: Inbound rule for mDNS traffic [UDP]

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [UDP 5004-5009]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open UDP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [UDP 5004-5009]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open UDP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6(DHCPV6-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCPV6 (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6) messages for stateful and stateless configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) messages for stateful auto-configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Destination Unreachable Fragmentation Needed (ICMPv4-In)
displayData.description: Destination Unreachable Fragmentation Needed error messages are sent from any node that a packet traverses which is unable to forward the packet because fragmentation was needed and the don't fragment bit was set.

displayData.name: Delivery Optimization (TCP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule to allow Delivery Optimization to connect to remote endpoints

displayData.name: Delivery Optimization (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule to allow Delivery Optimization to connect to remote endpoints

displayData.name: Google Chrome (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Google Chrome to allow mDNS traffic.

displayData.name: Microsoft Edge (mDNS-In)

displayData.name: Core Networking - Internet Group Management Protocol (IGMP-In)
displayData.description: IGMP messages are sent and received by nodes to create, join and depart multicast groups.

displayData.name: Core Networking - IPv6 (IPv6-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule required to permit IPv6 traffic for ISATAP (Intra-Site Automatic Tunnel Addressing Protocol) and 6to4 tunneling services.

displayData.name: @{Microsoft.Win32WebViewHost_10.0.22621.1_neutral_neutral_cw5n1h2txyewy?ms-resource://Windows.Win32WebViewHost/resources/DisplayName}
displayData.description: @{Microsoft.Win32WebViewHost_10.0.22621.1_neutral_neutral_cw5n1h2txyewy?ms-resource://Windows.Win32WebViewHost/resources/Description}

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Query User
displayData.description: Prompt the User for a decision corresponding to Inbound Traffic. This filter blocks any inbound packets for which there is no explicit rule to allow the packet, unless the user has allowed through the Query User pop up.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: Teredo socket option opt out block filter
AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows an AppContainer to receive loopback traffic from itself

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from by policy allowed AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from other non-AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: InternetClientServer Inbound Default Rule
displayData.description: InternetClientServer Inbound Default Rule

displayData.name: UWP Default Inbound Block Rule
displayData.description: This is the UWP Default Inbound Block filter. This filter blocks any inbound packets to UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for listening to a resource.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Loopback Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound ICMP Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for ICMP connections when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound DHCP Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for DHCP connections when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Neighbor Discovery Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for Neighbor Discovery when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Next Hop Tunnel Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for tunneling when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Tunnel Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows for tunneling when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: This filter blocks any inbound non-loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: DhcpFirewallPolicy
displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.name: DhcpFirewallPolicy
displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.name: Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service service hardening - RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service

displayData.name: Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service service hardening - RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service

displayData.name: Allow WebThreatDefSvc to receive from port 443
Allow inbound UDP traffic to NTP port 123
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow PNRP to send to port 3540
Allow Grouping to receive from port 3587
Allow inbound TCP traffic to AJRouter
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 1900
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 3702
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5040
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5160 (Wi-Fi Direct Transport)
Allow inbound UDP traffic to CDPSvc port 5050
Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Cast to Device streaming server hardening rules for RTSP
displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Cast to Device streaming server

displayData.name: Allow inbound RPC traffic to the Block Level Backup service (wbengine) over TCP
Allow incoming RPC traffic to VDS
IPsec Policy Agent service hardening - Remote Management
displayData.description: Allow IPsec Policy Agent inbound RPC/TCP traffic for Remote Management

displayData.name: Allow all inbound TCP and RPC to SPPEXTCOMOBJ
Allow inbound UDP traffic to SNMPTRAP service
Allow inbound UDP traffic to AJRouter
Block all inbound traffic to SearchProtocolHost
Block all inbound traffic to SearchFilterHost
WSH Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: Blocks all inbound traffic for services who have been network hardened

displayData.name: WFD ASP Coordination Protocol (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for WLAN Service to allow coordination protocol for WFD Service sessions [UDP 7235]

displayData.name: WFD ASP Coordination Protocol (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for WLAN Service to allow coordination protocol for WFD Service sessions [UDP 7235]

displayData.name: mDNS (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for mDNS traffic [UDP]

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [TCP 554]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open TCP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: mDNS (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for mDNS traffic [UDP]

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [TCP 554]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open TCP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Report (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: The Multicast Listener Report message is used by a listening node to either immediately report its interest in receiving multicast traffic at a specific multicast address or in response to a Multicast Listener Query.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Query (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: An IPv6 multicast-capable router uses the Multicast Listener Query message to query a link for multicast group membership.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Report v2 (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Multicast Listener Report v2 message is used by a listening node to either immediately report its interest in receiving multicast traffic at a specific multicast address or in response to a Multicast Listener Query.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Done (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Multicast Listener Done messages inform local routers that there are no longer any members remaining for a specific multicast address on the subnet.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Report (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: The Multicast Listener Report message is used by a listening node to either immediately report its interest in receiving multicast traffic at a specific multicast address or in response to a Multicast Listener Query.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Query (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: An IPv6 multicast-capable router uses the Multicast Listener Query message to query a link for multicast group membership.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Report v2 (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Multicast Listener Report v2 message is used by a listening node to either immediately report its interest in receiving multicast traffic at a specific multicast address or in response to a Multicast Listener Query.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Multicast Listener Done (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Multicast Listener Done messages inform local routers that there are no longer any members remaining for a specific multicast address on the subnet.

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [TCP 554]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open TCP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [TCP 554]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open TCP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [UDP 5004-5009]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open UDP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Microsoft Media Foundation Network Source IN [UDP 5004-5009]
displayData.description: InBound Rule for the Microsoft Media Foundation's Capture SVC to open UDP port to enable RTSP

displayData.name: Core Networking - Router Advertisement (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Router Advertisement messages are sent by routers to other nodes for stateless auto-configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6(DHCPV6-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCPV6 (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol for IPv6) messages for stateful and stateless configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP-In)
displayData.description: Allows DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) messages for stateful auto-configuration.

displayData.name: Delivery Optimization (TCP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule to allow Delivery Optimization to connect to remote endpoints

displayData.name: Delivery Optimization (UDP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule to allow Delivery Optimization to connect to remote endpoints

displayData.name: Google Chrome (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Google Chrome to allow mDNS traffic.

displayData.name: Microsoft Edge (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Microsoft Edge to allow mDNS traffic.

displayData.name: Microsoft Edge (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Microsoft Edge to allow mDNS traffic.

displayData.name: Microsoft Edge (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Microsoft Edge to allow mDNS traffic.

displayData.name: Microsoft Edge (mDNS-In)
displayData.description: Règle de trafic entrant pour Microsoft Edge pour autoriser le trafic mDNS.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Time Exceeded (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Time Exceeded error messages are generated from any node that a packet traverses if the Hop Limit value is decremented to zero at any point on the path.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Destination Unreachable (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Destination Unreachable error messages are sent from any node that a packet traverses which is unable to forward the packet for any reason except congestion.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Packet Too Big (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Packet Too Big error messages are sent from any node that a packet traverses which is unable to forward the packet because the packet is too large for the next link.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Parameter Problem (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Parameter Problem error messages are sent by nodes as a result of incorrectly generated packets.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Advertisement (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Advertisement messages are sent by nodes to notify other nodes of link-layer address changes or in response to a Neighbor Discovery Solicitation request.

displayData.name: Wireless Display Infrastructure Back Channel (TCP-In)
displayData.description: Inbound rule for Wireless Display Infrastructure back channel [TCP]

displayData.name: Core Networking - Router Solicitation (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Router Solicitation messages are sent by nodes seeking routers to provide stateless auto-configuration.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Solicitation (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Solicitations are sent by nodes to discover the link-layer address of another on-link IPv6 node.

displayData.description: Parameter Problem error messages are sent by nodes as a result of incorrectly generated packets.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Advertisement (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Advertisement messages are sent by nodes to notify other nodes of link-layer address changes or in response to a Neighbor Discovery Solicitation request.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Advertisement (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Advertisement messages are sent by nodes to notify other nodes of link-layer address changes or in response to a Neighbor Discovery Solicitation request.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Solicitation (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Solicitations are sent by nodes to discover the link-layer address of another on-link IPv6 node.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Solicitation (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Solicitations are sent by nodes to discover the link-layer address of another on-link IPv6 node.

displayData.name: Filtre de démarrage
displayData.description: Ce filtre est activé avant le démarrage du service.

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks loopback traffic to port 137

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows outbound AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: InternetClient Default Rule
displayData.description: InternetClient Default Rule

displayData.name: InternetClientServer Outbound Default Rule
displayData.description: InternetClientServer Outbound Default Rule

displayData.name: UWP Default Outbound Block Rule
displayData.description: This is the UWP Default Outbound Block filter. This filter blocks any outbound packets from UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for the resource they are trying to reach.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Loopback Exception
displayData.description: This filter allows loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Allow outbound UDP traffic from local NTP port 123 to remote NTP port 123

displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.description: DhcpFirewallPolicy

displayData.name: Allow PNRP to send to port 3540

Allow WebThreatDefSvc to send to port 443
Allow outbound LDAP traffic from SearchIndexer

displayData.description: Allow IPsec Policy Agent outbound LDAP/UDP traffic to Active Directory

displayData.description: Allow IPsec Policy Agent outbound LDAP/TCP traffic to Active Directory

displayData.name: Allow Grouping to send to port 3587
Allow outbound TCP traffic to LMHosts port 53
Allow outbound UDP traffic to LMHosts port 53
Allow outbound UDP traffic from fdphost port 1900
Allow outbound UDP traffic from fdphost port 3702
Device Metadata Retrieval
displayData.description: Allow dmrc communication with WMIS

displayData.name: Allow outbound TCP traffic from CDPSvc from any port to port 5160 (Wi-Fi Direct Transport)
Allow outbound UDP traffic from any port to CDPSvc port 5050
Allow outbound TCP traffic from CDPSvc from any port to port 5040
Allow all outbound TCP ports traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow outbound TCP traffic from WinHttpAutoProxySvc
Allow Out TCP traffic from WinDefend
Allow all outbound TCP and RPC from SPPEXTCOMOBJ
Allow outbound UDP traffic from AJRouter
Allow outbound TCP traffic from AJRouter
Allow outbound TCP traffic from fdphost
Allow outbound TCP traffic from DMEnrollment
Allow outbound TCP traffic from CDPSvc
AxInstSV TCP outbound allow
displayData.description: Allow only outbound TCP traffic from AxInstSV

displayData.name: Allow outbound TCP traffic from dmcertinst.exe
Allow outbound TCP traffic from omadmclient.exe
Allow outbound TCP traffic from deviceenroller.exe
Block all outbound traffic from SearchFilterHost
WSH Default Outbound Block
displayData.description: Blocks all outbound traffic for services who have been network hardened

displayData.description: Ce filtre permet l’inspection du protocole FTP.

displayData.name: Microsoft Corporation
displayData.description: Fournisseur IKEEXT intégré à Microsoft Windows WFP utilisé pour identifier les filtres ajoutés par IKE/AuthIP.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP intégré sécurité du service Windows et fournisseur de mise en quarantaine.

displayData.description: Fournisseur de protection des données d’entreprise MPSSVC intégré à Microsoft Windows WFP.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows Teredo firewall provider

displayData.description: Fournisseur de pare-feu Windows pour Microsoft Windows WFP intégré.

displayData.name: Microsoft Corporation
displayData.description: Fournisseur de configuration de la protection DoS IPsec intégré à Microsoft Windows WFP utilisé pour identifier les filtres ajoutés par la protection DoS IPsec.

displayData.description: Fournisseur de modèles TCP intégrés à Microsoft Windows WFP utilisé pour identifier les filtres ajoutés par la configuration basée sur le modèle TCP.
